item.title: OnAir 3.28
item.description:
What's New in OnAir 3.28

  • Device codes now support 6 characters (new firmware). 4-character codes still supported.
  • Menu bar icon now updates instantly when a meeting starts or ends.
  • Fixed microphone identified as "Browser" instead of the actual meeting app.
  • Fixed web meetings (Meet, Zoom Web) ending prematurely after 10 seconds.
  • Fixed race condition in external device change detection.
  • Microphone polling fallback for USB audio devices.
  • Shortcut detection cached at startup for reliable Focus Mode configuration.
  • Statistics: Manual ON count now matches the platform breakdown table.
  • Check for Updates no longer crashes on first click.
